title: 特斯拉将在机器人峰会暨博览会上分享构建 AMR 的路线图
summary: Joshua Joseph, an AMR Deployment Engineer at Tesla, will present a roadmap for deploying AMRs in legacy manufacturing environments. The post Tesla to share roadmap for building AMRs at Robotics Summit & Expo appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Tesla to share roadmap for building AMRs at Robotics Summit & Expo）

title: Skild AI 收购 Zebra Technologies 的机器人自动化业务
summary: Skild AI, a fast-rising startup that makes software to help robots learn to complete tasks, has bought the robotics automation division of Zebra Technologies Corp., marking its latest effort to broaden its reach in a hot segment.（原题：Skild AI Acquires Zebra Technologies’ Robotics Automation Business）
